Message.Dynamic: MT531 :"d:\desktop\dual_csi-2_camera_to_hdmi_bridge_demo\ecp5_raw10toparallel\source\i2c_ctrl.v":67:9:67:12|Found signal identified as System clock which controls 61 sequential elements including i2c_inst.i2c_ctrl_inst.addr_reg_H[6].
